2605.25836.title: TTPrint: Evidence-Grounded TTP Extraction via Diverge-then-Converge Verification
2605.25836.paper_summary: Extracting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from cyber threat intelligence (CTI) reports is an open-set, multi-label problem requiring both high recall (not missing techniques) and high precision (not hallucinating unsupported ones). Existing methods--rule-based, supervised, and LLM-based--struggle to achieve both: rule-based and supervised approaches lack generalizability across diverse attack descriptions, while LLM-based approaches that couple candidate generation and validation within a single inference step suffer from limited recall and precision simultaneously. We propose TTPrint, which addresses this challenge through a diverge-then-converge design inspired by how human analysts work: first extracting broadly, then verifying rigorously. In the divergent phase, reports are decomposed into atomic behaviors and candidate techniques are proposed broadly. A deterministic span localization stage then anchors each candidate to a specific evidence window in the source text. A convergent verification stage retains only candidates supported by both the localized evidence and the authoritative MITRE definition. We contribute two evaluation resources--a cleaned TRAM benchmark (TRAM-Clean) and a new annotated dataset (TTPrint-Bench)--to address known annotation noise in existing benchmarks and elevate the task to document-level TTP extraction. On TRAM-Clean and TTPrint-Bench, TTPrint achieves 76.48% and 87.39% macro-F1 respectively, outperforming the leading baseline by 63.5% and 29.4%. A multi-backbone analysis across six LLMs and a threshold sensitivity study further demonstrate generalizability across model choices and provide practical guidance for parameter selection.
2605.25836.paper_summary_zh: 從網路威脅情報 (CTI) 報告中提取 MITRE ATT&CK 技術是一個開放集、多標籤的問題，要求高召回率（不漏掉技術）和高精確率（不產生不支持的技術）。現有的方法——基於規則的、監督式的和基於 LLM 的——都難以同時達到這兩個要求：基於規則和監督式的方法在不同攻擊描述中缺乏通用性，而基於 LLM 的方法在單一推理步驟中結合候選生成和驗證，卻同時遭遇召回率和精確率的限制。我們提出了 TTPrint，通過一種受人類分析師工作啟發的分歧-再收斂設計來應對這一挑戰：首先廣泛提取，然後嚴格驗證。在分歧階段，報告被分解為原子行為，並廣泛提出候選技術。隨後，一個確定性跨度定位階段將每個候選技術固定在源文本中的特定證據窗口。收斂驗證階段僅保留那些同時受到定位證據和權威 MITRE 定義支持的候選技術。我們貢獻了兩個評估資源——一個清理過的 TRAM 基準（TRAM-Clean）和一個新的標註數據集（TTPrint-Bench）——以解決現有基準中的已知標註噪聲，並將任務提升至文檔級 TTP 提取。在 TRAM-Clean 和 TTPrint-Bench 上，TTPrint 分別達到 76.48% 和 87.39% 的宏 F1，分別比領先基準高出 63.5% 和 29.4%。對六個 LLM 的多骨幹分析和閾值敏感性研究進一步展示了模型選擇的通用性，並為參數選擇提供了實用指導。
2605.25836.author: Yutong Cheng et.al.
2605.25836.authors: Yutong Cheng, Changze Li, Raihan Sultan Pasha Basuki, Qian Cui, Wei Ding, Peng Gao
